title: alysicarpus rotundifolius
intro: Alysicarpus rotundifolius, also known as the Round-leaved Alysicarpus or Round-leaved Horse Gram, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. It is said to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating joint pain, and treating digestive issues. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea or decoction by boiling its leaves and roots in water, and it can also be made into a powder or capsule for easy consumption.
